chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمُحْرِمِ يَأْتِي أَهْلَهُ وَ قَدْ قَضَى بَعْضَ مَنَاسِكِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 105 – The one in Ihraam goes to his wife, and he had already fulfilled some of his rituals

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/357)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/357)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ وَقَعَ عَلَى امْرَأَتِهِ يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَزُورَ قَالَ إِنْ كَانَ وَقَعَ عَلَيْهَا بِشَهْوَةٍ فَعَلَيْهِ بَدَنَةٌ وَ إِنْ كَانَ غَيْرَ ذَلِكَ فَبَقَرَةٌ قُلْتُ أَوْ شَاةٌ قَالَ أَوْ شَاةٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Abu Khalid Al Qammat who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about a man who falls upon his wife on the day of the sacrifice before he performs Ziyaarat. Heasws said: ‘If he had fallen upon her with desire, so upon him is a camel; and if it was without that, so a cow’. I said, ‘Or a sheep?’ Heasws said: ‘Or a sheep’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Sinan from abu Khalid al-Qammat who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who involves himself in sexual intercourse with his wife on the day of al-Nahr (day of offering sacrifice) before performing Tawaf of Ziyarat. He (the Imam) said, ‘If he has done so with lust he owes a badanah, without it there is a cow.’ I said, ‘Or a sheep’ and he (the Imam) said, ‘Or a sheep.’”
